subject: Update multicloud broker and openstack version

Patch Set 1:

same comment as https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/94957:
need to wait fix for MSB (https://jira.onap.org/browse/AAI-2596) before checking this one.

Also there's no health check for multi cloud windriver as far as I understand. Would it be possible to add one?

Patch Set 1:

> 
> same comment as https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/94957:
> need to wait fix for MSB (https://jira.onap.org/browse/AAI-2596) before checking this one.
> 
> Also there's no health check for multi cloud windriver as far as I understand. Would it be possible to add one?

The health check for multicloud windriver (titanium cloud) has been in place since amsterdam release.
